title: cygnus-jet-utac v1.0.0: UTAC Analysis of Astrophysical Relativistic Jet Criticality
description: cygnus-jet-utac v1.0.0 applies UTAC (Universal Threshold Activation Criticality) to relativistic jet dynamics in Cygnus X-1 and analogous X-ray binary systems. The UTAC-Logistic ODE detects self-organized critical thresholds in jet quenching, re-ignition, and intermittency cycles. CREP metrics quantify the coherence and emergence properties of jet-state transitions. This package validates UTAC threshold detection against high-energy astrophysical time series and is part of the GenesisAeon ecosystem (genesis-os). Dual-licensed: GPLv3-or-later (code) + CC BY 4.0 (documentation).
